# fix555 — TV search: Go/Enter runs the search immediately

**Version:** 2.0.55 (`2.0.55+555`)
**Base:** v2.0.54 (live CI tag). Single ```diff block, generated byte-exact
against v2.0.54. Verified clean on a fresh v2.0.54 clone.
**Branch from:** v2.0.54.

---

## Why

The TV search ran only on a 250ms `onChanged` debounce — there was no
`onSubmitted`. Pressing **Go/Enter** (or D-pad select) did nothing immediate; the
search only fired after the debounce settled. This adds the missing submit path.

## What

- `tv_search_view.dart`: `DpadTextField` gains `onSubmitted` → cancels the
  pending debounce and runs `_run(query)` at once.
- Version bump + What's New entry (runbook-owned, in the same diff block).

Single file of logic, no behavior change beyond the immediate-fire on submit.

## Verification

- `flutter analyze` → **No issues found!**
- `flutter test` → **259 passed**
- `git apply --check` → clean on a fresh v2.0.54 clone

## Patch

```diff
diff --git a/lib/tv/tv_search_view.dart b/lib/tv/tv_search_view.dart
index 7073d25..0793fb6 100644
--- a/lib/tv/tv_search_view.dart
+++ b/lib/tv/tv_search_view.dart
@@ -229,6 +229,12 @@ class _TvSearchViewState extends State<TvSearchView> {
             enabled: _ready,
             autofocus: true,
             onChanged: _onChanged,
+            // fix555: pressing Go/Enter (or D-pad select) runs the search
+            // immediately instead of waiting out the 250ms onChanged debounce.
+            onSubmitted: (q) {
+              _debounce?.cancel();
+              _run(q.trim());
+            },
             decoration: InputDecoration(
               hintText: "Search channels and what's on…",
               prefixIcon: const Icon(Icons.search),
diff --git a/lib/whats_new_modal.dart b/lib/whats_new_modal.dart
index 6b9c7a3..ce884af 100644
--- a/lib/whats_new_modal.dart
+++ b/lib/whats_new_modal.dart
@@ -6,6 +6,9 @@ import 'package:open_tv/backend/settings_service.dart';
 /// in that minor". The dialog shows all entries for [version] whose key is
 /// a prefix of the running version string.
 const _changelog = <String, List<String>>{
+  '2.0.55': [
+    'TV: pressing Go/Enter on the search now runs the search immediately instead of waiting a moment after you stop typing.',
+  ],
   '2.0.54': [
     'Internal diagnostics only — no user-visible change. The TV search (“what’s on”) now logs the wall-clock time for each phase (name matches, EPG program search, live-channel resolve) so the cause of the Go-to-results lag is identifiable from the log.',
   ],
diff --git a/pubspec.yaml b/pubspec.yaml
index 358c4d2..4e9fc0c 100644
--- a/pubspec.yaml
+++ b/pubspec.yaml
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ publish_to: "none" # Remove this line if you wish to publish to pub.dev
 # https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Reference/InfoPlistKeyReference/Articles/CoreFoundationKeys.html
 # In Windows, build-name is used as the major, minor, and patch parts
 # of the product and file versions while build-number is used as the build suffix.
-version: 2.0.54+554
+version: 2.0.55+555
 
 environment:
   sdk: ^3.10.7
```

## Release — EXECUTE

```bash
git commit -m "fix555: TV search runs immediately on Go/Enter (onSubmitted) instead of only on the onChanged debounce"
git push origin main
git tag -a v2.0.55 -m 'Release v2.0.55' HEAD
git push origin refs/tags/v2.0.55
./scripts/build_and_release.sh
```

Per `CI-PIPELINE-STATE.md`: CI owns `version.json`. Do NOT run `update_version_json.py` or commit `version.json` before tagging.
